name: FurnaceCommand
author: AyzrixYTB
readme_markdown:
# Furnace ## Description ###### Furnace Command is a simple plugin that adds a command to furnace items in your hand. With this plugin, simplify the use of furnaces and allow your players to furnace their items faster. ### Command name: `furnace`
description: `Furnace the items in your hand`
permission: `furnace.command`
aliases: `[]` ### Configuration ```yaml # ______ # | ____| # | |__ _ _ _ __ _ __ __ _ ___ ___ # | __| | | | '__| '_ \ / _` |/ __/ _ \ # | | | |_| | | | | | | (_| | (_| __/ # |_| \__,_|_| |_| |_|\__,_|\___\___| # # prefix: "§6[§fAyzrix§6]" command_name: "furnace" command_description: "Furnace the items in your inventory" command_permission: "furnace.command" # ["alias1", "alias2", "alias3", ...] command_aliases: [] not_player: "{prefix} §cYou must be a player to use this command" not_permission: "{prefix} §cYou don't have the permission to use this command" furnace_success: "{prefix} §aThe item in your hand has been successfully furnace" cannot_furnace: "{prefix} §cThe item in your hand cannot be furnace" ``` ### License This plugin is licensed under the [GPLv3](http://www.gnu.org/licenses/gpl-3.0.html) >This program is free software: you can redistribute it and/or modify
